titleStmt.title: SII 41.89: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 89. (A.R. No. 88 of 1905.) Tiruttarakōsamaṅgai, Ramnad Taluk, Ramnad District. On the east wall of the kitchen of the Maṅgalēśvara temple at Tiruttarakōsamaṅgai.

p.hi: Pāṇḍya M. Kaliyugarāmaṉ Tirunelvēlipperumāḷ Vīra-pāṇḍya, Year 2+25 = 1323 A.D.

summary.p: The king gifted more than ten villages in Kīḻ-chembi-nāḍu as tax-free dēvadāna to the temple of Maṅgaipperumāḷ temple at Tiruvuttarakōsamaṅgai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti ko
nerimel koṇṭāṉ śrīkaliyukarāmaṉ tirunelvelip perumāḷ
virapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 2 vatu Etir 2 10 5 varuṣam cittirai mātam
10 2 śrīpāṇṭimaṇṭalattil kiṭccempināṭṭu śrītecam
tiruvuttarakocamaṅkai Uṭaiya nayiṉār maṅkaip perumāḷ
nayiṉār koyilil śrīruttira śrīmākeccuraṟku Iṉṉayiṉāṟku paḻaiya
tevatāṉamāṉa Ūrkaḷil nāḷatuvaraiyum poṉa Ūr
kaḷ niṅkalāka tirumalaippiṟattil kalveṭṭaṭuppaṭi Uḷḷa
Ūrkaḷ Iṉṉāḷ mutalukku tevatāṉamāka kaiyyāṇṭu ko
ḷḷumpaṭi tāpittuk kuṭukkaiyil Immaruyāti kalveṭṭuk ko
ṇṭu viṭṭuk kuṭutta Ūrāvatu kiḻcempināṭṭu mallalum
teṅkuṭiyum parāntaneriyum cittaiyum mocciyum Aṟuku
kuṭiyum maṉattaḷamum kuḷamum pacumaṇcāttaṉum kaṇ
ṇāṅkuṭiyum Ūrmelpaṟṟil miḻaṉkaṇṭaṉ Ēnta
lāṉa valaṅkaṉār Ēntalum tiyaṉārāppaṟṟil pāranimukkā
ṇi mutalāka vanta pa la nilam paṇañcu māvum pikalūril ka
ṇṭu koṇṭa māṇikkaṉ nilam meṟpaṭiyūr maṭaikaḻi Ēn
tal mukaṭṭāvāmaiyu Ulaka cintāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭulaka
civapoka meṟpaṟṟil taṭarākkuḷamum ccaṅkuḷamum
nakaiyum paṇṭā nakaiyum pattentalum Ēḻur cempi
nāṭṭu nāṭṭāṉum poṉṉantai kaṇṇaṉum toṟkuṟi
cciyum karukaṉaṟkuṟicciyum melaikaṇṇimaḷavāṉum taṭā
takaiyirukkaināṭṭil muttivayalum vayiravaṇiyumayil
pāṭum cevvirukkaināṭṭu paḻamperāvaḷarum tokalūr
maṇalūrum Āka Icainta Ūrkaḻi
nāṉkelkaikkuṭpaṭṭa nir nilamum karuñcai puñcaiyu
m nattamum toṭṭakkūṟum mel nokkiṉa maramu kīḻnō
kkiṉa kiṇaṟum maṟṟum Eppayapaṭṭatum caruvamāṉikamāka can
rātittaval cella kaiyyāṇṭu koḷḷumpaṭi kaṟpittu
viṭṭa Aḷavukku tiyile kallilum cempilum
veṭṭikkaiyyāṇṭu koḷḷavum
Digital edition of SII 41.89 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
